capabilities.name: Persistent Configuration Model (emConfigModel)
capabilities.verification_evidence: F22: ConfigModel requires filesystem I/O for load/save; covered by behavioral/unit tests. Behavioral/unit tests provide coverage.

capabilities.name: Core Configuration Panel UI (emCoreConfigPanel)
capabilities.verification_evidence: Implemented in Phase 5a: CoreConfigPanel settings UI

capabilities.name: Cursor Type Enumeration (emCursor)
capabilities.verification_evidence: F22: Cursor is a pure enum with no visual output; no golden data possible. Covered by construction tests.. Behavioral/unit tests provide coverage.

capabilities.name: Modal Dialog Widget (emDialog)
capabilities.verification_evidence: Dialog widget exercised by testpanel_expanded golden test (Test Dialog section)

capabilities.name: Error Display Panel Widget (emErrorPanel)
capabilities.verification_evidence: ErrorPanel is a trivial paint-only panel with no state; verified by code inspection

capabilities.name: File Chooser Dialog (emFileDialog)
capabilities.verification_evidence: F22: FileDialog requires windowing system for dialog window creation. Behavioral/unit tests provide coverage.

capabilities.name: File-displaying Panel (emFilePanel)
capabilities.verification_evidence: F22: FilePanel requires FileModel which needs filesystem I/O. Behavioral/unit tests provide coverage.

capabilities.name: File Browser Widget (emFileSelectionBox)
capabilities.verification_evidence: F22: FileSelectionBox requires filesystem directory listing. Behavioral/unit tests provide coverage.
